name: free-whisper-llm
description: Local Whisper voice agent for VS Code and Cursor — plan, ask, edit code, or run shell commands by speaking.

walkthroughs.title: Get started with Voice Agent
walkthroughs.description: Local Whisper + your LLM for voice coding.

steps.title: Setup Whisper
steps.description:
Install the local Python STT environment.
[Setup Whisper](command:voiceAgent.setupWhisper)

steps.title: Configure your LLM
steps.description:
Use Ollama locally, or set an API key for OpenAI/Anthropic.
[Set API Key](command:voiceAgent.setApiKey)
[Health Check](command:voiceAgent.healthCheck)

steps.title: Review privacy
steps.description:
Audio stays local. Transcript + editor context may be sent to your LLM.
[Privacy notice](command:voiceAgent.showPrivacy)

steps.title: Talk or type
steps.description:
Press Ctrl+Shift+Space (Cmd+Shift+Space on macOS), or open the panel and type.
[Open Panel](command:voiceAgent.openPanel)

voiceAgent.whisper.language.description: Speech recognition (Whisper) language. Use auto to detect. Does not change the LLM; Llama 3.2 officially supports en, de, fr, it, pt, hi, es, th.

voiceAgent.whisper.pythonPath.description: Python executable for Whisper. Leave as python3 to auto-use extension/.venv after Setup Whisper (PEP 668 safe).

voiceAgent.whisper.scriptPath.description: Optional override path to whisper_transcribe.py. Empty = bundled script.

voiceAgent.whisper.warmSidecar.description: Keep Whisper model warm via persistent sidecar (Pro). Falls back to one-shot on Free.

enumDescriptions: Linux/WSL uses PulseAudio (parecord); Windows/macOS uses webview mic. Falls back if one fails.
Browser getUserMedia in the panel (needs Cursor/Windows mic permission).
Record via parecord/arecord/ffmpeg on the extension host (best for WSL).

voiceAgent.audio.autoStopMs.description: Automatically stop microphone recording after this many milliseconds (default 5000).

voiceAgent.llm.provider.description: LLM provider for intent routing and handlers.

voiceAgent.llm.baseUrl.description: Base URL for Ollama or OpenAI-compatible APIs.

voiceAgent.llm.apiKey.description: DEPRECATED — use “Voice Agent: Set API Key” (Secret Storage). Legacy values are migrated once.

voiceAgent.llm.timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for LLM requests in milliseconds.

voiceAgent.shell.confirm.description: Ask before running low-risk shell commands. Medium/high risk always confirm; blocked commands never run.

voiceAgent.edit.confirmMultiFile.description: Legacy setting; edits always confirm unless Always approve edits is enabled in the panel.

voiceAgent.confidenceThreshold.description: Below this confidence, intent falls back to ask.

voiceAgent.analytics.enabled.description: Write privacy-safe local analytics (no audio/source/transcripts) to ~/.local/share/voice-agent/analytics.jsonl.

voiceAgent.history.maxEntries.description: Maximum number of Pro session history entries kept locally (oldest dropped first).

voiceAgent.history.recordDrafts.description: When Pro session history is available, also record transcribed/typed drafts and discarded prompts (not only completed runs).

voiceAgent.billing.checkoutUrl.description: Browser checkout URL for Voice Agent Pro.

voiceAgent.billing.portalUrl.description: Customer portal URL for managing a Pro subscription.
